modules.name: lanzou.api.models
documentation:
容器类，用于储存文件、文件夹，支持 list 的操作，同时支持许多方法方便操作元素
元素类型为 namedtuple，至少拥有 name id 两个属性才能放入容器

documentation: 用于路径 List 之间排序

documentation: 所有 item 的 name-id 列表，兼容旧版

methods.name: lanzou.api.models.ItemList.all_name
documentation: 所有 item 的 name 列表

methods.name: lanzou.api.models.ItemList.append
documentation: 在末尾插入元素

methods.name: lanzou.api.models.ItemList.index
documentation: 获取索引

methods.name: lanzou.api.models.ItemList.insert
documentation: 指定位置插入元素

methods.name: lanzou.api.models.ItemList.clear
documentation: 清空元素

methods.name: lanzou.api.models.ItemList.filter
documentation:
筛选出满足条件的 item
condition(item) -> True

methods.name: lanzou.api.models.ItemList.find_by_name
documentation: 使用文件名搜索(仅返回首个匹配项)

documentation: 使用 id 搜索(精确)

methods.name: lanzou.api.models.ItemList.update_by_id
documentation: 通过 id 搜索元素并更新
具有 name, id 属性对象的列表

modules.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3
documentation: -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.create_local_copy
documentation:
Make a local copy of the sqlite cookie database and return the new filename.
This is necessary in case this database is still being written to while the user browses
to avoid sqlite locking errors.

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.crypt_unprotect_data
documentation: Code adapted slightly from https://github.com/Arnie97/chrome-cookies

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.get_kde_wallet_password
documentation: Retrieve password used to encrypt cookies from KDE Wallet

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.get_secretstorage_password
documentation: Retrieve password used to encrypt cookies from libsecret

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.expand_paths_impl
documentation: Expands user paths on Linux, OSX, and windows

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.create_cookie
documentation: Shortcut function to create a cookie

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.chrome
documentation:
Returns a cookiejar of the cookies used by Chrome. Optionally pass in a
domain name to only load cookies from the specified domain

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.extreme360
documentation:
Returns a cookiejar of the cookies used by Chrome. Optionally pass in a
domain name to only load cookies from the specified domain

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.se360
documentation:
Returns a cookiejar of the cookies used by Chrome. Optionally pass in a
domain name to only load cookies from the specified domain

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.sougou
documentation:
Returns a cookiejar of the cookies used by Chrome. Optionally pass in a
domain name to only load cookies from the specified domain

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.qqbrowser
documentation:
Returns a cookiejar of the cookies used by Chrome. Optionally pass in a
domain name to only load cookies from the specified domain

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.chromium
documentation:
Returns a cookiejar of the cookies used by Chromium. Optionally pass in a
domain name to only load cookies from the specified domain

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.opera
documentation:
Returns a cookiejar of the cookies used by Opera. Optionally pass in a
domain name to only load cookies from the specified domain

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.brave
documentation:
Returns a cookiejar of the cookies and sessions used by Brave. Optionally
pass in a domain name to only load cookies from the specified domain

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.edge
documentation:
Returns a cookiejar of the cookies used by Microsoft Egde. Optionally pass in a
domain name to only load cookies from the specified domain

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.vivaldi
documentation:
Returns a cookiejar of the cookies used by Vivaldi Browser. Optionally pass in a
domain name to only load cookies from the specified domain

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.firefox
documentation:
Returns a cookiejar of the cookies and sessions used by Firefox. Optionally
pass in a domain name to only load cookies from the specified domain

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.safari
documentation:
Returns a cookiejar of the cookies and sessions used by Safari. Optionally
pass in a domain name to only load cookies from the specified domain

functions.name: lanzou.browser_cookie3.load
documentation:
Try to load cookies from all supported browsers and return combined cookiejar
Optionally pass in a domain name to only load cookies from the specified domain

modules.name: lanzou.api.core
documentation: 蓝奏网盘 API，封装了对蓝奏云的各种操作，解除了上传格式、大小限制

variables.name: lanzou.api.core.executors
documentation: 线程数 min(32, os.cpu_count() + 4)

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud._get_response_host
documentation: 获取蓝奏响应的下载 host 域名

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.set_max_size
documentation: 设置单文件大小限制(会员用户可超过 100M)

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.set_upload_delay
documentation: 设置上传大文件数据块时，相邻两次上传之间的延时，减小被封号的可能

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.login
documentation:
登录蓝奏云控制台[已弃用]
对某些用户可能有用

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.get_cookie
documentation: 获取用户 Cookie

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.login_by_cookie
documentation: 通过cookie登录

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.logout
documentation: 注销

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.delete
documentation: 把网盘的文件、无子文件夹的文件夹放到回收站

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.clean_rec
documentation: 清空回收站

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.get_rec_dir_list
documentation: 获取回收站文件夹列表

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.get_rec_file_list
documentation: 获取回收站文件列表

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.get_rec_all
documentation: 获取整理后回收站的所有信息

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.delete_rec
documentation: 彻底删除回收站文件(夹)

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.delete_rec_multi
documentation: 彻底删除回收站多个文件(夹)

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.recovery
documentation: 从回收站恢复文件

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.recovery_multi
documentation: 从回收站恢复多个文件(夹)

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.recovery_all
documentation: 从回收站恢复所有文件(夹)

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.get_file_list
documentation: 获取文件列表

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.get_dir_list
documentation: 获取子文件夹列表与全路径

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.clean_ghost_folders
documentation: 清除网盘中的幽灵文件夹

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.get_full_path
documentation: 获取文件夹完整路径

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.get_file_info_by_url
documentation:
获取文件各种信息(包括下载直链)
\:param share_url: 文件分享链接
\:param pwd: 文件提取码(如果有的话)

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.get_file_info_by_id
documentation: 通过 id 获取文件信息

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.get_durl_by_url
documentation: 通过分享链接获取下载直链

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.get_durl_by_id
documentation: 登录用户通过id获取直链

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.get_share_info
documentation: 获取文件(夹)提取码、分享链接

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.set_passwd
documentation:
设置网盘文件(夹)的提取码, 现在非会员用户不允许关闭提取码
id 无效或者 id 类型不对应仍然返回成功 :(
文件夹提取码长度 0-12 位  文件提取码 2-6 位

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.mkdir
documentation: 创建文件夹(同时设置描述)

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud._set_dir_info
documentation: 重命名文件夹及其描述

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.rename_dir
documentation: 重命名文件夹

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.set_desc
documentation: 设置文件(夹)描述

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.rename_file
documentation: 允许会员重命名文件(无法修后缀名)

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.get_move_folders
documentation: 获取全部文件夹 id-name 列表，用于移动文件至新的文件夹

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.get_move_paths
documentation: 获取所有文件夹的绝对路径(耗时长)

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.move_file
documentation: 移动文件到指定文件夹

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.move_folder
documentation: 移动文件夹(官方并没有直接支持此功能)

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud._upload_small_file
documentation: 绕过格式限制上传不超过 max_size 的文件

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud._upload_big_file
documentation: 上传大文件, 且使得回调函数只显示一个文件

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.upload_file
documentation: 解除限制上传文件

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.upload_dir
documentation:
批量上传文件夹中的文件(不会递归上传子文件夹)
\:param folder_id: 网盘文件夹 id
\:param dir_path: 文件夹路径
\:param callback (filename, total_size, now_size) 用于显示进度
\:param failed_callback (code, file) 用于处理上传失败的文件

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.down_file_by_url
documentation: 通过分享链接下载文件(需提取码)

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.get_folder_info_by_url
documentation: 获取文件夹里所有文件的信息

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.get_folder_info_by_id
documentation: 通过 id 获取文件夹及内部文件信息

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud._check_big_file
documentation: 检查文件列表,判断是否为大文件分段数据

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud._down_big_file
documentation:
下载分段数据到一个文件，回调函数只显示一个文件
支持大文件下载续传，下载完成后重复下载不会执行覆盖操作，直接返回状态码 SUCCESS

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.down_dir_by_url
documentation: 通过分享链接下载文件夹

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.get_share_info_by_url
documentation: 获取分享文件信息 和 get_file_info_by_url 类似，少一个下载直链

methods.name: lanzou.api.core.LanZouCloud.get_user_name
documentation: 获取用户名
